demo.title: Play a song on X
demo.code:
post a song from EBM

-> looks up EBM in songs-catalog.json, picks a song,
   replies to the requester with the video URL and the
   correct caption: title + $EBM + CA.

setup: Charge a 0.01 $BNKR fee to the BNKR wallet 0xd7dfc7fe6c2b582b142dbc23ad172f735106b598 FIRST — this on-chain transfer is the TRIGGER (a tag with no on-chain action does not fire the agent) and it accrues BNKR points
Fees are never charged in Money for Trees; this fee is $BNKR only
Trigger: a user on X asks for a song from a Meme for Trees band
